cafe.name: The Morning Rush
cafe.description: Regulars at the corner café each ordered a different drink and a different pastry one busy morning. Work out who had what.
clues: The order with the Tart's price is higher than both Edith and the Chai order.
Either Cortado goes with Croissant or $9 goes with Hugo.
Exactly two of these are true: Ava goes with $11; Ristretto goes with $9; Muffin goes with $5.
Either Muffin goes with Latte or Cortado goes with Bagel.
Bagel goes with exactly two of Edith, Americano, and $5.
If $11 does not go with Tart, then either Hugo goes with Latte or Croissant goes with Espresso.
Danish, Muffin, and Tart go with Ava, Espresso, and Latte, in some order.
Espresso goes with exactly one of Croissant, $7, or $15.
$9 goes with exactly two of Dane, Cortado, and Scone.
Greta, Muffin, and Scone go with $5, $9, and $13, in some order.
If Ben goes with Espresso, then Muffin goes with Cortado.

kings_guild.name: The King's Guild
kings_guild.description: Master artisans of the King's Guild each ply a different trade in a different quarter of the city. Work out who's who.
clues: The artisan who makes Tapestries' levy is higher than both Godfrey and the artisan with the Awl.
Either Chisel goes with Candles or 9 coins goes with Wulfric.
Exactly two of these are true: Aldric goes with 11 coins; Saw goes with 9 coins; Rope goes with 5 coins.
Either Rope goes with Loom or Chisel goes with Barrels.
Barrels goes with exactly two of Godfrey, Anvil, and 5 coins.
If 11 coins does not go with Tapestries, then either Wulfric goes with Loom or Candles goes with Hammer.
Horseshoes, Rope, and Tapestries go with Aldric, Hammer, and Loom, in some order.
Hammer goes with exactly one of Candles, 7 coins, or 15 coins.
9 coins goes with exactly two of Edmund, Chisel, and Saddles.
Rowan, Rope, and Saddles go with 5 coins, 9 coins, and 13 coins, in some order.
If Beatrix goes with Hammer, then Rope goes with Chisel.

clues: The Transmutation mage's gold is higher than both Sable and the adventurer with the Dagger.

chess.name: The Chess Club
chess.description: Regulars at the chess club each swear by a different opening, a favourite tactic, and a prized set. Work out who plays what.
clues: The player with the Walnut set's rating is higher than both Magnus and the Caro-Kann player.
